title: Auto-populate FedEx Shipping Label with the Items in one of the Monday.com Boards
excerpt: I have a question about mailing using a shipping company such as DHL FedEx, UPS, etc  We have a Board in Monday.com with a list of leads with addresses, etc. Currently, we cut and paste over a 100 plus items into the lab…

posts.author: Cross49028 (Bertha Cross )
posts.cookedHtml: I have a question about mailing using a shipping company such as DHL FedEx, UPS, etc We have a Board in Monday.com with a list of leads with addresses, etc. Currently, we cut and paste over a 100 plus items into the label for the Shipping company such as FedEx. We would like to know if there is a software that integrates with Monday.com to auto-populate the mailing information onto the Shipping carrier form.

posts.author: Wittkowo0o (KhaniSundari)
posts.cookedHtml: You need to go to the add-on settings. Click on EZ post bulk print labels of label printers link under WooCommerce menu listed in the WordPress left sidebar menu. The add-on allows you to print bulk labels in two.
